whisper.banner_intro: Bristlenose needs the Whisper transcription model ({size}).
whisper.aborted_no_fetch: Whisper model {repo_id} is not in cache and --no-fetch is set. Run `bristlenose doctor --fetch` to fetch it ahead of time, or re-run without --no-fetch.

ffmpeg.banner_missing: ffmpeg is required to read video files. Not found on PATH.
ffmpeg.aborted: ffmpeg is required but was not found. Install it using the command above and re-run.

api_key.source_attribution: Using {provider_display} API key from {source}. Verifying: ~$0.0001, no transcript content.
api_key.no_credit:
Your {provider_display} account has no API credit available.
Top up at {billing_url}
({minimum_note})
and re-run.
api_key.model_unavailable: The requested model is not available for your {provider_display} account. Check available models at {console_url} and either enable the model or change `--llm-model` to one your account can use.
api_key.rate_limit: {provider_display} is rate-limiting this account. Wait a minute and re-run, or reduce `llm_concurrency` in your bristlenose.toml.
api_key.generic:
Provider says: {message}.
If this looks like a credit-balance issue, top up at the provider's billing console and re-run.
api_key.network:
Couldn't reach the provider: {message}.
Check DNS / VPN / proxy settings, then re-run.
api_key.azure_deployment_unavailable: Azure deployment wasn't found. This is your Azure portal **deployment name**, not a model id — check it in the Azure portal under Azure OpenAI → Deployments. Update BRISTLENOSE_AZURE_DEPLOYMENT (or azure_deployment in bristlenose.toml) and re-run. Underlying: {message}.
api_key.google_model_unavailable: Gemini denied access to the requested model. This is usually a tier gate, region restriction, or billing not enabled — check the Google Cloud Console at {console_url}. If billing is set up, try a different model via --llm-model. Underlying: {message}.
api_key.local_server_down: Ollama doesn't appear to be running. Start it with `ollama serve` (or open the Ollama app on macOS), then re-run. Underlying: {message}.
api_key.local_model_not_pulled: The requested local model isn't pulled. Run `ollama pull <model>` to download it (check the model name in bristlenose.toml or --llm-model), then re-run. Underlying: {message}.
